title: jacobinia aurea
intro: Jacobinia aurea, also known as the yellow jacobinia or gelsemium, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub-like plant with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Jacobinia aurea include reducing pain and inflammation, relieving muscle spasms, and acting as a natural sedative. Herbal preparations of Jacobinia aurea can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
